must_have_quals: At least 2+ years of software experience architecting, building, launching and maintaining complex systems (a formal degree is not required, we are prioritizing industry experience), Proficiency in JavaScript/TypeScript, Passion for software engineering to build and ship great product, Hands-on experience shipping valuable products to production with real user feedback, A high bar for quality, Strong cross-team communication and collaboration skills, Experience using AI tools (e.g., Claude Code, Cursor), including writing effective prompts and evaluating outputs
core_responsibilities: Collaborate cross functionally with product managers, designers, and other engineers to spec, design, and build features and systems, Partner with quality engineers to define, build and maintain testing strategy, Contribute to technical discussions, code reviews, observability, ensuring scalability, maintainability, and performance, Grow your teams by interviewing and recruiting talented engineers to Ironclad, Work on a modern stack built upon: TypeScript, ReactJS, Node.js, Java, and Docker containers in Kubernetes on Google Cloud Platform (experience with these specific technologies not required)
job_summary: Ironclad is the leading AI contracting platform that transforms agreements into assets. As a Software Engineer at Ironclad, you'll work cross-functionally to identify business problems and architect, build, and verify solutions, contributing to a platform that enhances the efficiency of legal professionals.
